title: UBA Medicine Entrance Score Calculator 2026 | Hacé Cuentas
description: Calculate your UBA medicine entrance chances. Find out what CBC average you need to get into medicine at UBA.
intro: Modern study methods leverage cognitive science principles: spaced repetition, active recall, and interleaving. Applied correctly, you'll learn faster and retain more. This calculator shows the CBC average needed to enter medicine at UBA. Values are current through 2026 and updated regularly to keep you informed.
keyTakeaway: Formula: **CBC average + quota**. Direct application with your input values. Determine the CBC score needed to enter medicine at UBA.
useCases: Technical calculations for UBA medicine entrance requirements
explanation:
**Study methods and learning** are grounded in cognitive science (Ebbinghaus, Bjork, Dunlosky). Techniques like spaced repetition, active recall, and interleaving have solid evidence.

## How It's Calculated

Your CBC average and the available quota determine your chances of entering medicine at UBA.

This calculator applies the formula with your input values, checking typical ranges and alerting when values fall outside reasonable bounds.

## Final Notes

This calculation is for reference only. For critical decisions (financial, medical, legal), consult a specialized professional. Values are current through 2026 and updated regularly.

faq.q: What is the CBC exam at UBA?
faq.a: Six subjects required for medicine entrance at UBA, with a minimum average needed.

faq.q: How many students can enter medicine at UBA each term?
What's the typical cutoff score for UBA medicine?
Can I retake the CBC exam?
faq.a: Yes, many students retake to improve their score.
Yes, once you pass CBC you can enroll. The cutoff applies in second year.

faq.q: What are the alternatives to UBA medicine?
faq.a: Private options include UCA, Favaloro, and Austral, but tuition is expensive.

faq.q: How long does it take to become a doctor in Argentina?
faq.a: Medical school is 6 years, plus a 3–5 year residency.

faq.q: Is this calculator free to use?
faq.a: Yes, completely free with no account required.

faq.q: What happens if I don't reach the cutoff score?
faq.a: You can retake the CBC exam in the next semester.

faq.q: When does the cutoff score apply?
faq.a: The cutoff is applied when entering second year, so first-year entry is open to all who pass CBC.

sources.name: NIST — National Institute of Standards and Technology

dataUpdate.notes: Fixed formula, does not require external data updates
